title: justicia equitans
intro: Justicia equitans, also known as the Brazilian plume poppy or butterfly weed, is a flowering plant native to Brazil and other parts of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and fight off infections. The health benefits of Justicia equitans include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory health, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Justicia equitans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
